project: DNA AI Labs Command Center Production Pilot MVP
description: Replace the current Vercel-hosted governed-workflow demo with a production-ready pilot foundation while preserving server-side workflow enforcement and the metadata-only data boundary.

userStories.title: Document production runtime configuration
userStories.description: As an operator, I need a complete validated environment contract for the production service.
acceptanceCriteria: Document required OIDC, database, tenant, approved-artifact, notification, and integration configuration variables
Add a configuration validator that reports missing required production configuration without exposing secrets
Demo mode remains explicit and labelled
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Add OIDC identity-provider interface
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an identity-provider boundary independent of any specific company vendor.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a server-side identity adapter interface for verified subject, groups, organization, and session expiry
Provide a test adapter used only by tests or explicit demo mode
Production runtime rejects unverified identity headers
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Verify OIDC bearer tokens
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I need the API to validate issuer, audience, signature, and expiry before trusting claims.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement JWT verification through configured issuer JWKS and audience
Reject malformed, expired, wrong-issuer, and wrong-audience tokens with structured 401 responses
Never log token contents
Add focused verification tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Requires OIDC issuer, audience, and client configuration for deployment.

userStories.title: Map verified groups to application roles
userStories.description: As an administrator, I need least-privilege application roles derived on the server from verified group claims.
acceptanceCriteria: Add configurable group-to-role mapping for every role in SPEC.md
Remove client role-switching outside explicit demo mode
Deny access when no mapped role is present
Add authorization mapping tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Add secure session and CSRF protection
userStories.description: As a user, I need browser API access protected from cross-site requests and session fixation.
acceptanceCriteria: Use secure HttpOnly SameSite cookies or verified bearer tokens according to configured auth mode
Require and validate CSRF protection for cookie-authenticated mutations
Set secure response headers without weakening CSP
Add CSRF success and rejection tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Define production storage port
userStories.description: As a developer, I need business logic separated from the demo SQLite implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Define a storage interface covering users, projects, decisions, audit events, and transactions
Refactor workflow service to depend on the interface rather than a concrete SQLite database
Keep current workflow tests passing through a test or demo adapter
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Add PostgreSQL migration framework
userStories.description: As an operator, I need repeatable migrations for the production relational schema.
acceptanceCriteria: Add migration runner and ordered SQL migrations for the current core entities
Document the migration command and database URL requirement
Migrations are idempotent or tracked in a schema-migrations table
Add migration runner tests where practical
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Requires a company-approved PostgreSQL connection for deployment.

userStories.title: Add tenant-scoped production schema
userStories.description: As a tenant member, I need every authoritative record scoped to my organization.
acceptanceCriteria: Add organizations and organization-scoped core record columns with indexes and foreign keys
Make audit events organization-scoped
Define migration path from the demo schema without copying demo data into production
Add schema-level tenant isolation tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Implement PostgreSQL read adapter
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I need portfolio reads to come from the managed relational database.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement tenant-scoped user, project, evidence, review, decision, and audit read queries
Use parameterized queries only
Return structured database-unavailable errors without falling back to demo data in production
Add adapter tests using a disposable test database or query mocks
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Implement PostgreSQL mutation transactions
userStories.description: As a user, I need workflow mutations and audit records committed atomically.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement transaction-backed project, evidence, review, decision, approval, and handoff mutations
Each successful mutation writes its audit event in the same transaction
Rollback leaves neither partial data nor partial audit events
Add rollback tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Require production database readiness
userStories.description: As an operator, I need readiness checks that validate the authoritative database and migrations.
acceptanceCriteria: Production startup fails closed when database URL or migrations are unavailable
Readiness reports database connectivity and pending migration state without secrets
Demo mode keeps its explicit non-ready status
Add readiness tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Add soft-delete lifecycle controls
userStories.description: As an administrator, I need records retained safely instead of being destructively deleted.
acceptanceCriteria: Add deleted-at, deleted-by, and deletion-reason fields for applicable entities
Exclude soft-deleted records from normal queries
Restrict restore and deletion operations to authorized administrators
Audit delete and restore mutations
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Add retention-policy enforcement metadata
userStories.description: As a compliance owner, I need retention state recorded for audits and final decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add retention classification and retention-until metadata to final decisions and audit events
Set a minimum seven-year default policy in configuration documentation
Prevent ordinary deletion before retention expiry
Add retention guard tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Add audit-log integrity verification
userStories.description: As an auditor, I need evidence that durable audit history has not been altered silently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add append-only audit sequence or hash-chain metadata
Provide a verification command or protected endpoint
Detect and report an altered audit record in tests
Document operational verification steps
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.title: Document backup and restore operations
userStories.description: As operations staff, I need an executable managed-database backup and restore runbook.
acceptanceCriteria: Add backup, restore, RPO, RTO, and quarterly restore-test runbook
Include audit-integrity verification after restore
Document configuration ownership and escalation paths
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Actual backups are owned by the selected managed database provider.

userStories.title: Add intake draft persistence
userStories.description: As a submitter, I need to save an incomplete intake without exposing it to reviewers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add draft status and draft create/read/update endpoints
Restrict draft access to the submitter and collaborators
Drafts do not enter selection queues or portfolio counts
Audit draft mutations
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables.

userStories.title: Build intake draft UI
userStories.description: As a submitter, I need to save and resume an intake from the browser.
acceptanceCriteria: Add save-draft and resume-draft controls to the intake flow
Show validation and save failures accessibly
Do not expose draft content to unauthorized roles
npm test passes
npm run check passes
Verify in browser using available browser tooling
userStories.notes: Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables. In-app browser backend was unavailable in this session; live HTTP/API verification passed against the local demo server.

userStories.title: Add intake collaborators
userStories.description: As a submitter, I need to invite limited collaborators to help prepare a draft.
acceptanceCriteria: Add collaborator records with explicit draft-level permissions
Only the submitter can add or remove collaborators
Collaborators cannot submit or change ownership without authorization
Audit collaborator changes
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Directory lookup is implemented in later stories; accepts validated IDs until then. Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables.

userStories.title: Support intake submission and withdrawal
userStories.description: As a submitter, I need to submit a valid draft and withdraw it while it is in triage.
acceptanceCriteria: Add explicit submit and withdraw transitions with state guards
Reject submit when required selection data is incomplete
Restrict withdrawal to the owner before selection
Audit both transitions
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables.

userStories.title: Add triage comments and requests for information
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I need to comment on a submitted intake and request clarification.
acceptanceCriteria: Add threaded or chronological triage comments with author and timestamp
Restrict comment visibility to authorized intake participants and reviewers
Support a request-for-information state without advancing selection
Audit comment and request mutations
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables.

userStories.title: Version intake revisions and comparisons
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I need to compare resubmitted intake revisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Snapshot submitted intake content with immutable revision numbers
Create a new revision on resubmission
Expose a revision comparison response showing changed fields
Add revision authorization and comparison tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes

userStories.description: As a program administrator, I need to create and configure program cycles.
acceptanceCriteria: Add cycle fields for theme, dates, capacity, steering group, and status
Add administrator-only create and update endpoints
Reject invalid date ranges and capacity values
Audit cycle mutations
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables.

userStories.title: Build cycle administration UI
userStories.description: As a program administrator, I need an accessible screen for cycle configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Add list, create, and edit cycle views for administrators
Show accessible validation summaries
Hide administration controls from unauthorized roles
npm test passes
npm run check passes
Verify in browser using available browser tooling
userStories.notes: Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables. In-app browser backend was unavailable in this session; live HTTP/API verification passed against the local demo server.

userStories.title: Enforce cycle capacity during selection
userStories.description: As a lab lead, I need selection to respect the cycle's approved capacity.
acceptanceCriteria: Associate projects with cycles and capacity units
Block selection when capacity would be exceeded
Return a structured capacity error including remaining capacity
Add selection capacity tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables.

userStories.title: Add feature-flag service
userStories.description: As an administrator, I need server-enforced pilot controls for unfinished integrations and workflow changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tenant-scoped feature flags with defaults and admin-only mutation
Evaluate flags server-side before protected features run
Audit flag changes
Add enabled and disabled behavior tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables.

userStories.title: Add role-administration audit controls
userStories.description: As a program administrator, I need to manage application role assignments when policy allows.
acceptanceCriteria: Add role-assignment metadata separate from external group claims
Restrict changes to administrators and prevent unilateral final-decision authorization
Audit role changes with before and after values
Add privilege-escalation tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: External group claims remain the source of truth when OIDC mapping is configured. Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables.

userStories.title: Define directory integration interface
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a vendor-neutral directory adapter for people and organizations.
acceptanceCriteria: Define directory lookup contract for active status, manager, organization, and display identity
Add configuration and timeout behavior
Directory failures never validate a person silently
Add adapter contract tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables.

userStories.title: Validate owners through directory lookup
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I need sponsor, owner, and lead assignments checked against the company directory.
acceptanceCriteria: Validate active status for sponsor, receiving owner, metric owner, and project lead
Persist only approved identity metadata required by the specification
Reject inactive or unknown people with structured validation errors
Add lookup failure tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Requires a configured directory provider in production. Preview deployment blocked because Vercel preview has no required runtime environment variables.

userStories.title: Build directory-backed people picker
userStories.description: As a submitter, I need to search authorized active people instead of choosing hard-coded users.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace hard-coded person options in intake and assignment UI
Support accessible search, loading, empty, and error states
Do not expose unauthorized directory fields
npm test passes
npm run check passes
Verify in browser using available browser tooling
userStories.notes: Added a role-gated directory people search API and replaced hard-coded intake person selects with accessible search-backed pickers that handle loading, empty, and error states. Responses expose only approved active-person metadata. Tests and check passed; in-app browser backend was unavailable, so local demo-mode HTTP/API verification covered served picker markup, sanitized search output, and 403 for an unauthorized role. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Display directory organization context
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I need to see each project's receiving organization and manager context.
acceptanceCriteria: Include allowed organization and manager metadata in project views
Do not display inactive assignment holders as valid owners
Add a structured warning when directory data is stale
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Project reads now compute directory assignment context at read time for metric owner, sponsor, receiving owner, and project lead. Project views show allowed organization and manager metadata, inactive receiving owners are not counted as valid owners or allowed through selection, and stale/inactive context produces structured warning codes. Tests and check passed. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Add delivery-kit data model and API
userStories.description: As a project lead, I need structured delivery-readiness items with accountable owners.
acceptanceCriteria: Add delivery-kit items for architecture, evaluation, operating model, onboarding, support, cost, monitoring, and rollback
Add authorized CRUD endpoints with approved evidence links
Audit item changes
Add required item validation tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Added required delivery-kit item keys, SQLite and PostgreSQL persistence, tenant-scoped migration, project read serialization, and authorized list/update/delete API endpoints. Completed items require approved evidence links, item changes are audited, and required item validation is covered by tests. Tests and check passed. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Build delivery-kit workspace
userStories.description: As a project lead, I need to complete and review delivery-kit items in the project workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Render item status, owner, evidence, and acceptance date
Provide accessible edit controls for authorized users
Show transfer-readiness gaps clearly
npm test passes
npm run check passes
Verify in browser using available browser tooling
userStories.notes: Added a project-brief delivery-kit workspace that renders required item status, owner, evidence link, and acceptance date, with editable status/owner/evidence controls for authorized roles. The workspace clearly lists transfer-readiness gaps. Tests and check passed; in-app browser backend was unavailable, so local demo-mode HTTP/API verification covered served workspace code, authorized item save, unauthorized 403, and project payload gap output. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Add Fellow assignment data model
userStories.description: As a program lead, I need to track Fellows, roles, and manager acknowledgements per cycle.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Fellow assignment records scoped to cycle and project
Require manager acknowledgement before an assignment becomes active
Audit assignments and acknowledgements
Add state-guard tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Added Fellow assignment persistence, tenant-scoped migration, API endpoints, and workflow guards. Assignments are scoped to cycle and project, cannot become active until the recorded manager acknowledges, and create/update/acknowledgement mutations emit audit events. Tests and check passed. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Build Fellow assignment UI
userStories.description: As a program lead, I need to assign Fellows and see their capacity obligations.
acceptanceCriteria: Add authorized Fellow assignment and acknowledgement views
Show assignment role, manager acknowledgement, and project
Handle empty and unavailable directory states accessibly
npm test passes
npm run check passes
Verify in browser using available browser tooling
userStories.notes: Added Fellow assignment workspace in the project brief with assignment role, capacity, project, manager acknowledgement status, authorized create controls, and manager acknowledgement action. Empty and unavailable states use status text. Tests and check passed; in-app browser backend was unavailable, so local demo-mode HTTP/API verification covered served workspace code, authorized create, unauthorized 403, and manager acknowledgement to active. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Require delivery readiness for transfer
userStories.description: As a receiving owner, I need transfer finalization blocked until the agreed delivery kit is complete or excepted.
acceptanceCriteria: Include required delivery-kit items in transfer gate evaluation
Return unmet items with decision gate details
Audit accepted exceptions
Add transfer-blocking tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Transfer gate evaluation now derives delivery-kit readiness from required items and returns missing item keys such as delivery_kit:architecture in decision gate details. Accepted delivery-kit exceptions emit a specific audit event. Transfer-blocking tests, tests, and check passed. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Add approved artifact verification adapter
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I need evidence links verified against configured document and source-control systems.
acceptanceCriteria: Define artifact verifier interface with configured domains and optional record validation
Preserve allow-list validation while adding verification status
Failed verification never marks a gate complete
Add verifier success, failure, and timeout tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Added approved-origin artifact verification with optional record validation, persisted verification status for evidence-backed workflow records, and fail-closed behavior for provider failure or timeout. Tests and check passed. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Add work-tracking integration adapter
userStories.description: As a project lead, I need a link to delivery work and a current external work status.
acceptanceCriteria: Define a work-tracking adapter and project work-item model
Support create-or-link behavior behind a feature flag
Expose last verified status and refresh time
Add adapter failure tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Added a feature-gated work-tracking adapter, project work-item model, create/link and refresh workflow/API paths, last verified status metadata, and adapter failure/timeout coverage. Requires approved work-tracking provider configuration for production. Tests and check passed. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Add calendar integration adapter
userStories.description: As a decision participant, I need decision meetings and 30-day follow-ups linked to the company calendar.
acceptanceCriteria: Define calendar adapter for decision and follow-up events
Create or validate scheduled events only when integration succeeds
Store approved event references and dates
Add scheduling failure tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Added calendar adapter create/validate behavior, feature-gated decision-meeting and follow-up scheduling, approved event reference/date persistence, and scheduling failure/timeout tests. Requires approved calendar provider configuration for production. Tests and check passed. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Expose integration status in project workspace
userStories.description: As a user, I need visible verified status for work, artifact, and calendar integrations.
acceptanceCriteria: Show integration state, last verification time, and actionable errors
Do not imply success from an unverified link
Restrict configuration diagnostics to authorized roles
npm test passes
npm run check passes
Verify in browser using available browser tooling
userStories.notes: Added a project workspace integration status panel for artifact, work-tracking, and calendar verification state with last verification times, unverified-link warnings, and lab/admin-only provider diagnostics. Tests and check passed; no browser-control backend was available, so local demo-mode HTTP verification confirmed served integration markup, CSS, and project payload metadata. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Add integration health reporting
userStories.description: As operations staff, I need a protected view of integration health and recent failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Record non-sensitive integration attempts and outcomes
Provide administrator-only health summary endpoint
Keep failure data free of tokens and sensitive payloads
Add authorization tests
npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Added non-sensitive integration attempt recording for artifact, work-tracking, and calendar operations plus an administrator-only health summary endpoint. Failure records store codes and scoped metadata only, not URLs, tokens, or provider payloads. Tests and check passed. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Add notifications outbox
userStories.description: As the system, I need reliable notification events created with business mutations.
acceptanceCriteria: Add notification and outbox records with recipient, type, state, related entity, and attempt count

Do not store sensitive content in notification payloads

npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Added tenant-scoped notification outbox records and transactional enqueueing for intake, adoption acknowledgement, review, decision request, handoff acceptance, and follow-up scheduling. Payloads contain only controlled metadata. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Implement notification worker and retries
userStories.description: As operations staff, I need retryable asynchronous delivery with transparent status.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a worker command that claims, sends, retries, and dead-letters notifications

npm test passes
npm run check passes
userStories.notes: Added the notification worker command, claim leases, bounded retry/dead-letter handling, stable idempotency keys, and non-sensitive delivery audit records. Production delivery still requires the approved provider adapter planned in US-043. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Add notification delivery adapters

userStories.notes: Added feature-gated email/chat sender interfaces and metadata-only templates for workflow notification events. Production still requires approved provider callbacks/configuration. Vercel preview remains blocked because preview environment variables are not configured.

userStories.title: Schedule post-transfer follow-ups
